title: Admin System Update Preflight Response
description: Compatibility preflight for the current instance (mirrors @selfhelp/shared IUpdatePreflight). Resource/Docker checks are performed by the SelfHelp Manager, not the CMS.

items.description: A single preflight check. Version/compatibility checks (e.g. plugin_compatibility for a core update blocked by a plugin, frontend_compatibility for a frontend-only update the running core forbids or that needs a different core, downgrade, upgrade_path) additionally carry the standardized compatibility-error fields so the admin/operator sees the blocking component and the required range.

component.description: Optional: which component the check is about (e.g. 'plugin', 'core').

component_id.description: Optional: id of the blocking component (e.g. the plugin id).

current_version.description: Optional: the instance's current version (or the blocking plugin's installed version) at preflight time.

required_range.description: Optional: the compatibility range the component requires.

blocking.description: Optional: whether this compatibility error blocks the update (part of the standardized compatibility-error shape).

pinned.description: Optional: for plugin_compatibility, whether the blocking plugin is pinned (must be unpinned before it can be updated to a compatible version).
